Inspected and found air stuck in product pipeline. Tried releasing manually, a bit of product came and then same issue happened. Bypassed contiflow B107 pressure transmitter and manually brought product to filler. Filler ran a bit and same issue occurred. Checked and found saturation pressure and filler pressure found  2 bar. Increased to 3 bar and restarted product prep at filler. Machine running fine. Program needs to be adjusted as saturation pressure needs to be set higher than filler pressure for product to reach filler.

bbw_worklog.issue: DAW and filtered water tanks empty

bbw_worklog.description:
The sensors on the infeed conveyor shifted out of position, causing the tower to stop and preventing it from moving to the unloading section.
Adjusted the position of the sensors
Pieces of a can became lodged between the guide rails and the machine frame. Removed several change parts to clean out the remaining can debris
The damper on the flap closer (service side) had come loose and moved out of position, resulting trays not being properly glued. Reset the damper to the correct position and adjusted the flap closer.

Cans were not transferring properly from the starwheel to the filler and were getting damaged. The damaged cans then became stuck in the seamer, causing it to stop every 10 to 15 minutes.

Tried adjusting the synchronization between the filler and the starwheel, but it did not help, so the settings were returned to their original values.

Removed the starwheel and checked the height difference at the transfer points. Adjusted the gap, which fixed the issue.
Очищення від бруду та клею ,приготовлені до наступного продукту

Videojet gutter cleaned, printhead wiped with IPA, ink level checked, print quality verified

Tried manually opening and closing valve, still not seating properly. Ran valve manually for current production, needs to be serviced when syrup line is not in use. Manually closed two hand valves so that no extra sugar goes into product. Instructed operators to do the same after using the line.
